bio: Tinker is an original resident who has been around for years and you'll find her by the busy bridge in Cluster O, patiently sitting and soaking up as much attention as she can from passersby. She knows her feeders well and loves the gentle affection from visitors to her area. She is a sweet, calm, and affectionate girl with a gentle nature who loves pets and gets on well with other cats. Her sister Binker was adopted after recovering from a hip injury, but Tinker is still waiting for her chance to be chosen. All she wants is a loving home where she can feel safe and finally belong.
location: By the bridge/skateboard park in Cluster O
